_publications._publicationTitle: Combined MEK inhibition and BMP2 treatment promotes osteoblast differentiation and bone healing in Nf1Osx -/- mice.

_contextSnippet: ...rBMP2 treatment increased the number of CFU-Ob colonies in BMSC cultures from WT mice...but failed to do so in Nf1 -deficient BMSCs...combination treatment with Trametinib and rBMP2significantly increased...
details: BMP2 failed to increase CFU-Ob colonies in Nf1-deficient BMSCs, but combination treatment with Trametinib and BMP2 significantly increased CFU-Ob colonies and osteoblast marker gene expression
